headline: Charles Schwab Recognized Among Nation’s Most Community-Minded Companies for 10th Consecutive Year
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, June 23, 2026--Charles Schwab was named to The Civic 50 by Points of Light for the 10th consecutive year, recognizing the firm as one of the most community-minded companies in the United States.
